ip_outcome_note: Card name matches character name exactly. Art depicts a large dark winged creature with a Y-shaped silhouette, red markings, and black body — canonical Yveltal visual signature as the version mascot of Pokemon Y. PokemonTCG.io confirms card name 'Yveltal', National Pokedex no. 717, artist Misa Tsutsui, Team Up (sm9-95). Identity confirmed via name match, Pokedex number, and canonical Y-silhouette.

trivia_bullets.text: Yveltal is the version mascot of Pokemon Y and a member of the Kalos Aura Trio alongside Xerneas and Zygarde. Its role is the destruction and death counterpart to Xerneas's life: when its lifespan ends, it absorbs the life energy of all surrounding creatures before cocooning into dormancy [Bulbapedia: Yveltal, via WebSearch snippet].

Yveltal's body silhouette — wings spread, tail fanned — forms a recognizable Y-shape, directly mapping to the letter of its version title. Its name also begins with Y. National Pokedex no. 717 [PokemonTCG.io sm9-95; Bulbapedia: Yveltal, via WebSearch snippet].
Flavor text on this card (confirmed via PokemonTCG.io): 'When its life comes to an end, it absorbs the life energy of every living thing and turns into a cocoon once more.' [PokemonTCG.io sm9-95]

Yveltal is a dual-type Dark/Flying Legendary — one of the few Legendary Pokemon with the Dark type. Its design draws on both avian and draconic traits: beak-like snout, blue eyes, horns, and broad wings. Described as a large Pokemon whose appearance is based on these avian-draconic hybrids [Bulbapedia: Yveltal, via WebSearch snippet].
